code:
---
config:
  theme: neo
  layout: dagre
---
stateDiagram
  direction LR
  classDef draftC fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef publicC fill:#bbf8c0,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef unlistedC fill:#f9f7ae,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef privateC fill:#ddd6f3,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef withdrawnC fill:#fcbbbb,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  [FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> draft
  draft --> public:Publish
  draft --> unlisted:Link only
  public --> unlisted:Unlist
  unlisted --> public:List
  public --> private:Hide(FinTech_AuthVault)
  unlisted --> private:Hide(FinTech_TransactionQueue)
  private --> public:Re-publish
  private --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  public --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  unlisted --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  withdrawn --> public:Restore(FinTech_TransactionQueue)
  withdrawn --> [FinTech_LedgerService]
  draft:Draft
  public:Public
  unlisted:Unlisted
  private:Private
  withdrawn:Withdrawn
  note right of draft : Drafts are only visible to editors.
  note right of public : Public posts are listed and discoverable.
  note right of unlisted : Unlisted posts are shared by URL only.
  note right of private : Private posts are hidden from everyone.
  note right of withdrawn : Withdrawn posts are removed from public view.
  class draft draftC
  class public publicC
  class unlisted unlistedC
  class private privateC
  class withdrawn withdrawnC

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech的内容发布系统画一个状态图，核心是从TransactionQueue开始，经过Draft、Public、Unlisted、Private这几个状态，最后还能Withdrawn。
明白，方向用LR横向布局。我想确认一下状态之间的流转：Draft可以直接发布成Public，也可以先变成Unlisted仅链接访问，对吗？另外Hide操作需要调用AuthVault吗？
对的，Draft有两个出口：Publish到Public，Link only到Unlisted。Public和Unlisted都能Hide成Private，但触发条件不同——Public隐藏需要AuthVault验证，Unlisted隐藏则是走TransactionQueue。
好的，我先把主线状态流转画出来，包括Publish、Link only、Unlist、List这些转换。Private之后可以Re-publish回Public，也能Withdraw，这个我理解正确吧？
没错，而且Withdrawn状态有个特殊设计：它可以通过Restore操作回到Public，这个Restore必须由TransactionQueue触发。另外Withdrawn最终会归档到LedgerService。
LedgerService是终止状态吗？还有，每个状态需要加注释说明可见性范围，比如Draft只对编辑可见，Private对所有人隐藏，这样用户能看懂权限设计。
是的，LedgerService作为终点。注释很重要：Draft仅编辑可见，Public可发现，Unlisted仅URL分享，Private完全隐藏，Withdrawn已从公网移除。另外给每个状态配个颜色区分吧。
完成。我用draftC粉色、publicC绿色、unlistedC黄色、privateC紫色、withdrawnC红色来区分，所有stroke统一333。状态图已经包含了完整的流转和权限注释。
